chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-968 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 3597/24 2.For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 Petitioner is called absent. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. From perusal of prayer clause, it reflects that petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the Electric Inspector for redressal of his grievance, which remedy has not been availed by him. Under the circumstances, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application(s) leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the Electric Inspector for redressal his grievance, if he desires so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
